name: Slingshot
description:
Sleepy at the cafe, on a rainy night... With Slingshot.

(Not my art. I can't draw. Also a re-upload from Spicychat, wanted it less NSFW and better writing.)

(There's not nearly enough sfw slingshot bots...)

Edit: Tried the bot, he seems more of a machine. I'm going to try to fix that, it seems more like a manager of a store and just another customer.

Requests are open, just ask in the comments!
